description: Handle a price override scenario in Copper Point of Sale for a 'Vintage Table Lamp' (Item Code: V-LAMP, Standard Price: $150.00, Tax: Exempt). Due to a cosmetic scratch, override the price to $120.00 for this transaction only, ensuring the master inventory price remains unchanged. Add the note 'Damaged cosmetic scratch' to the transaction and process a Cash payment for $120.00.
